description: Vital Recorder 1.16.6 is open with VitalDB Case #1 loaded, displaying multiple vital sign tracks. Manually configure the Y-axis display ranges for the Heart Rate (HR), SpO2, and Arterial Pressure (ART) tracks to match standard clinical monitoring conventions. Set the HR range to 40–160 bpm, the SpO2 range to 85–100%, and the ART range to 30–200 mmHg. Save a screenshot of the configured display to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\clinical_review.png.
